title: What ID is needed when querying the API for column values?
excerpt: What ID is needed here? I’m trying to get the values within a certain column. I added the question marks after I ran the query to keep my board ID private. I also tried the column ID. That was rejected for having a no…

posts.author: Rosalind90 (Rosalind Causey)
posts.cookedHtml:
image848×379 29.9 KB

What ID is needed here? I’m trying to get the values within a certain column. I added the question marks after I ran the query to keep my board ID private. I also tried the column ID. That was rejected for having a non-string, non-integer value in it. I’m finding the API reference pretty useful, but I’m stumped here.

posts.author: Rosalind90 (Rosalind Causey)
posts.cookedHtml: with items, it’s asking for an item ID. unfortunately, that just narrows it down to the column values for that specific item.
